summary: Crisp, clear sound captures a front‑row experience with an exciting opener “Stranger” and standout playing from Garcia, Weir, Phil and Brent.
review: The recording is exceptionally crisp and clear, letting listeners hear every nuance – especially Phil’s bass and the full band mix. Fans who were there describe the opening of “Stranger” as a magical moment with both Garcia and Weir reacting to the crowd, making this show a must‑listen for its energy and superb performance.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave high marks (4–5 stars) and praised both the musical performance and the audio clarity, indicating a strong show supported by an excellent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the sound as very crisp and clear; Phil’s bass is especially audible and well‑balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening with “Stranger” created a memorable front‑row moment; overall the set felt energetic and engaging, with strong interaction between band members and audience.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia received a double‑take from the crowd when walking onstage, indicating an exciting presence.
band_member_comments.Phil: His bass is highlighted as sounding even better than usual, standing out clearly in the mix.
band_member_comments.Bob: Weir also got a double‑take from the audience at the start of the show.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland waved back to fans, showing his active stage presence.
